allow: Bash(node -e "const yaml = require\('yaml'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); ['ci-backend.yml','ci-frontend.yml','codeql.yml'].forEach\(f => { try { yaml.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('.github/workflows/'+f,'utf8'\)\); console.log\(f+': OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(f+': ERRO - '+e.message\); } }\)")

Bash(node -e "const js_yaml = require\('js-yaml'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); ['ci-backend.yml','ci-frontend.yml','codeql.yml'].forEach\(f => { try { js_yaml.load\(fs.readFileSync\('.github/workflows/'+f,'utf8'\)\); console.log\(f+': OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(f+': ERRO - '+e.message\); } }\)")
